---

## What should improve?

Describe the defensive, educational, or documentation improvement.

## Safe local reproduction

List the sample file, command, or documentation page involved. Use synthetic data only.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The change stays defensive and local-first.
- [ ] Tests or docs are updated when relevant.
- [ ] No real secrets, customer data, offensive automation, or live-target scanning are added.
